'''Veubgri''' ('''Veubg''' for singular form) were an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Gbu]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. They were tall six-legged beings, with tendrils for arms.

During [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], the Veubgri of Gbu were visited by a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] delegation including [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her children as part of her tour of several remote New Republic member worlds. During the visit to Gbu, the New Republic delegation was forced to meet with their Veubgri counterparts on a [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] due to the high gravity of the planet.

[[Grake]], a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of the [[Empire Reborn]], was a Veubg.
